svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:151.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/151.0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="p1c6VzZRCQT7bo49u8MN"> <mxGraphModel dx="1503" dy="1005" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title WearItRight - Sequence Diagram (All Application Flows)
autonumber

skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 2
skinparam sequenceGroupBorderThickness 1.5
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor \"Visitor / User\" as User

box \"Frontend (Browser)\" #EFF6FF
 participant \"Web UI\" as UI
end box

box \"Backend Services\" #F0FDF4
 participant \"AuthService\" as Auth
 participant \"ProfileService\" as Profile
 participant \"RecommendationService\" as RecSvc
 participant \"ShoppingService\" as ShopSvc
 participant \"FilterSortService\" as FilterSvc
 participant \"FavoritesService\" as FavSvc
 participant \"FeedbackService\" as FeedbackSvc
 participant \"MonitoringService\" as Monitor
end box

box \"Persistence\" #FFF7ED
 participant \"Database\" as DB
 participant \"AuditLog\" as Audit
end box

box \"External Integrations\" #FDF4FF
 participant \"WeatherProviderClient\" as WeatherAPI
 participant \"ShoppingProviderClient\" as ShopAPI
 participant \"EmailClient\" as Email
end box

== FR-01 | User Registration (LLR 1.1, 1.2, NFR-10, NFR-11) ==

User -> UI : Submit registration form\n(email, password)
UI -> Auth : register(email, password)
Auth -> Auth : Validate password rules\n(min 8 chars, upper, lower, digit)
Auth -> Auth : Hash password\n(salted adaptive hash)
Auth -> DB : Persist User record
DB --> Auth : User created
Auth -> DB : Record ConsentRecord\n(TERMS_OF_USE, PRIVACY_POLICY)
Auth -> Audit : Log REGISTRATION event
Auth --> UI : Registration success
UI --> User : Redirect to profile setup

== FR-02 | User Login and Session (LLR 1.3, NFR-12, NFR-13) ==

User -> UI : Submit login form\n(email, password)
UI -> Auth : login(email, password)
Auth -> DB : Load User by email
DB --> Auth : User record
Auth -> Auth : Verify password hash
Auth -> DB : Create UserSession\n(accessToken, expiresAt)
Auth -> Audit : Log LOGIN event
Auth --> UI : Return accessToken
UI --> User : Authenticated - show dashboard

== FR-03 | Password Reset (LLR 1.4, NFR-10) ==

User -> UI : Request password reset
UI -> Auth : requestPasswordReset(email)
Auth -> DB : Create PasswordResetToken\n(signed, expiring)
Auth -> Email : sendPasswordReset(email, token)
Email --> Auth : Sent
Auth --> UI : Reset link sent confirmation
User -> UI : Submit new password via reset link
UI -> Auth : resetPassword(token, newPassword)
Auth -> DB : Verify token not expired or used
Auth -> Auth : Hash new password
Auth -> DB : Update passwordHash
Auth -> DB : Mark token used
Auth -> Audit : Log PASSWORD_RESET event
Auth --> UI : Password updated
UI --> User : Redirect to login

== FR-04, FR-05 | Profile and Exclusion Setup (LLR 1.5, 1.6, 1.7) ==

User -> UI : Submit profile form\n(style, fit, sizes, colors, budget)
UI -> Profile : updatePreferences(userId, data)
Profile -> Auth : authorize(userId, ROLE:USER)
Auth --> Profile : Authorized
Profile -> DB : Persist UserPreferences
Profile -> DB : Persist SizeProfile
Profile --> UI : Preferences saved
User -> UI : Submit exclusion preferences\n(colors, patterns, categories)
UI -> Profile : updateExclusions(userId, exclusions)
Profile -> DB : Persist ExclusionPreferences
Profile --> UI : Exclusions saved
UI --> User : Profile setup complete

== FR-06 to FR-09 | Location, Event Context, and Recommendation Request (LLR 2.1-2.6, NFR-09) ==

User -> UI : Grant geolocation or enter location manually
UI -> UI : Capture LocationContext\n(source, city, lat/lon)
note right of UI : Geolocation used only after\nexplicit user consent (LLR 9.5, NFR-15)
User -> UI : Select event type, dress code, event time
UI -> UI : Build EventContext
UI -> RecSvc : generateRecommendations(userId, location, eventContext)
RecSvc -> Auth : authorize(userId, ROLE:USER)
Auth --> RecSvc : Authorized
RecSvc -> FeedbackSvc : showLoading(\"Fetching weather...\")
FeedbackSvc --> UI : Loading indicator shown

alt Weather cache valid (TTL not expired)
 RecSvc -> DB : Load cached WeatherSnapshot
 DB --> RecSvc : WeatherSnapshot
else Cache expired or missing
 RecSvc -> WeatherAPI : getCurrentWeather(location)
 alt Weather API available
 WeatherAPI --> RecSvc : WeatherSnapshot\n(temp, precipitation, humidity, wind)
 RecSvc -> DB : Cache WeatherSnapshot\n(TTL = configured duration)
 else Weather API unavailable
 RecSvc -> FeedbackSvc : showFallbackGuidance(\"weather_unavailable\")
 FeedbackSvc --> UI : Prompt user for manual weather input
 User -> UI : Enter weather conditions manually
 UI -> RecSvc : Provide manual WeatherSnapshot
 end
end

RecSvc -> DB : Load UserPreferences and ExclusionPreferences
DB --> RecSvc : Preferences and exclusions
RecSvc -> DB : Persist RecommendationRequest\n(userId, locationContextId, eventContextId, weatherSnapshotId)

== FR-09 to FR-13 | Generation, Weather Rules, Ranking, Explanation, Confidence Tips (LLR 3.1-3.8) ==

RecSvc -> RecSvc : Generate >= 3 OutfitRecommendation candidates\n(top + bottom + footwear + optional accessory)
RecSvc -> RecSvc : applyExclusions(recommendations, exclusions)\n(remove items in excluded colors/patterns/categories)
RecSvc -> RecSvc : applyWeatherRules(recommendations, weather)\n(add layering if temp below threshold;\nprefer rain-resistant if precipitation > threshold)
RecSvc -> RecSvc : rankRecommendations()\n(relevanceScore = weather fit + event fit + preference match)

loop For each OutfitRecommendation
 RecSvc -> DB : Persist OutfitRecommendation\n(rank, relevanceScore, estimatedTotalPrice)
 RecSvc -> DB : Persist OutfitItems\n(top, bottom, footwear, [accessory])
 RecSvc -> DB : Persist RecommendationExplanation\n(weatherReason, eventReason)
 RecSvc -> DB : Persist StyleTip\n(confidence tip text)
end

RecSvc -> Audit : Log RECOMMENDATION_REQUEST\n(requestId, inputs, recommendationIds)
RecSvc -> Monitor : recordLatency(\"recommendation.generate\", elapsed)
RecSvc --> UI : OutfitRecommendation[] (ranked, with explanations and tips)
FeedbackSvc -> UI : Hide loading indicator

== FR-14 | Regenerate Recommendations (LLR 4.4) ==

User -> UI : Click \"Regenerate Recommendations\"
UI -> RecSvc : regenerate(requestId)
RecSvc -> DB : Load original RecommendationRequest\n(preserve same context unless changed by user)
RecSvc -> RecSvc : Re-run generation pipeline
RecSvc --> UI : Fresh OutfitRecommendation[]
UI --> User : Updated recommendations displayed

== FR-15, FR-16 | Outfit Display and Item Detail View (LLR 4.1-4.5) ==

UI --> User : Render outfit cards\n(image, name, brand, price, store, total cost,\n\"Why this outfit\" section, confidence tip)
User -> UI : Expand outfit card
UI --> User : Show item-level detail view\n(per OutfitItem with linked ProductOffers)

== FR-17 to FR-20 | Product Matching, Price Aggregation, Best Price, Redirect (LLR 5.1-5.6, NFR-08) ==

UI -> ShopSvc : mapOutfitToProducts(outfitId)
ShopSvc -> FeedbackSvc : showLoading(\"Finding best prices...\")
FeedbackSvc --> UI : Loading indicator shown

loop For each active ShoppingProvider
 ShopSvc -> ShopAPI : searchProducts(category, brand, size, color)
 alt Provider available
 ShopAPI --> ShopSvc : ProductOffer[]\n(price, currency, inStock, productUrl, lastCheckedAt)
 ShopSvc -> ShopSvc : normalizeCurrency(offers, userPreferredCurrency)
 ShopSvc -> DB : Persist / refresh ProductOffers
 else Provider unavailable
 ShopSvc -> ShopSvc : Apply ResiliencePolicy\n(retry with backoff + circuit breaker)
 ShopSvc -> Monitor : recordError(\"shopping_provider\", providerName)
 note right : FR-31 / NFR-06: Core recommendation\nflow continues with remaining providers
 end
end

ShopSvc -> ShopSvc : findBestPrice(productItemId)\n(lowest normalizedPrice across providers)
ShopSvc -> DB : Persist PriceComparisonResult
ShopSvc -> DB : Exclude out-of-stock offers from default results
ShopSvc --> UI : ProductOffer[] with Best Price label
FeedbackSvc -> UI : Hide loading indicator
UI --> User : Display price comparison cards

User -> UI : Click \"Open in Store\" on an offer
UI --> User : Open retailer productUrl in new browser tab

== FR-21, FR-22 | Filter and Sort Products (LLR 6.1-6.3) ==

User -> UI : Apply filters\n(priceMin/Max, brand, size, color, store)
UI -> FilterSvc : filterOffers(offers, ProductQuery)
FilterSvc --> UI : Filtered ProductOffer[]
User -> UI : Select sort order\n(price asc/desc, relevance, newest)
UI -> FilterSvc : sortOffers(offers, sortBy)
FilterSvc --> UI : Sorted ProductOffer[]\n(completed in < 2 seconds for up to 200 items)
UI --> User : Updated product listing

== FR-23 to FR-25 | Save and Manage Favorites (LLR 7.1-7.4) ==

User -> UI : Save outfit to favorites
UI -> FavSvc : saveOutfit(userId, outfitId)
FavSvc -> Auth : authorize(userId, ROLE:USER)
Auth --> FavSvc : Authorized
FavSvc -> DB : Persist FavoriteOutfit (savedAt = now)
FavSvc --> UI : Outfit saved confirmation

User -> UI : Save item to favorites
UI -> FavSvc : saveItem(userId, offerId)
FavSvc -> Auth : authorize(userId, ROLE:USER)
Auth --> FavSvc : Authorized
FavSvc -> DB : Persist FavoriteItem (savedAt = now)
FavSvc --> UI : Item saved confirmation

User -> UI : Open Favorites list
UI -> FavSvc : listFavorites(userId)
FavSvc -> DB : Load FavoriteOutfit[] and FavoriteItem[]\n(including savedAt timestamps)
DB --> FavSvc : Favorites data
FavSvc --> UI : Favorites list
UI --> User : Display saved outfits and items with timestamps

User -> UI : Remove outfit from favorites
UI -> FavSvc : removeOutfit(userId, outfitId)
FavSvc -> DB : Delete FavoriteOutfit record
FavSvc --> UI : Removed confirmation

== FR-28 | Error Handling and User Feedback (LLR 8.1-8.3, NFR-20) ==

UI -> RecSvc : generateRecommendations(...)
RecSvc --> UI : Error response (engine failure)
UI -> FeedbackSvc : showError(code, \"Unable to generate recommendations.\nPlease adjust your context or try again.\")
FeedbackSvc --> UI : Actionable error message with next-step guidance
RecSvc -> Monitor : recordError(\"recommendation.generate\", errorCode)

== FR-29 | Security and Access Control (LLR 9.1-9.4, NFR-10, NFR-12) ==

note over UI, Auth
 All protected API calls must include a valid accessToken in the
 Authorization header. AuthService.authorize() validates the token
 and user role before any profile, recommendation, favorites, or
 admin operation proceeds. All traffic is enforced over HTTPS /
 TLS 1.2+ (NFR-10). Sessions expire after configurable inactivity
 period and are invalidated on logout (NFR-13).
end note

== FR-30 | Account and Personal Data Deletion (LLR 9.6, NFR-16) ==

User -> UI : Request account deletion
UI -> Auth : deleteAccount(userId)
Auth -> Auth : authorize(userId, ROLE:USER)
Auth -> DB : Delete UserPreferences, SizeProfile, ExclusionPreferences
Auth -> DB : Delete RecommendationRequests, FavoriteOutfits, FavoriteItems
Auth -> DB : Delete UserSessions and ConsentRecords
Auth -> DB : Anonymise or purge User record
Auth -> Audit : Log ACCOUNT_DELETION event
Auth --> UI : Account deletion confirmed
UI --> User : Logged out - account removed

== FR-32 | Audit Logging and Observability (LLR 12.2-12.3, NFR-17, NFR-18) ==

note over Audit, Monitor
 AuditLog captures entries from AuthService and RecommendationService
 for all security and recommendation events, stamped with userId,
 correlationId, eventData, and timestamp (NFR-17).
 MonitoringService continuously tracks latency, error rate, throughput,
 and external API health, raising alerts when configured thresholds
 are breached (NFR-18).
end note

Monitor -> Monitor : checkApiHealth(WeatherProvider)
Monitor -> Monitor : checkApiHealth(ShoppingProviders)
Monitor -> Monitor : raiseAlert(metric) if threshold exceeded

@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="CSTFSE6Sx-oJ1SF90R3_-4"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="6278" width="3374" x="810" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
